use_cases: SaaS landing page hero section with animated headline text
Software product marketing pages with gradient accent borders
Tech startup website main banner with word-by-word reveal animation
App landing pages requiring quick, engaging hero presentations
ai_summary: A SaaS-focused hero section featuring animated text reveal with blur and opacity transitions, framed by subtle blue gradient accent borders. The component uses Framer Motion for word-by-word entrance animations and includes a responsive Navbar, dark mode support, and minimalist design aesthetic. Ideal for software product landing pages and developer tool marketing.
